cleavage agent: digested with trypsin or neutrophil elastase
enrichment method: purified P672 with a C-terminal StrepII-His purification tag by nickel affinity
fractionation method: purified P672... followed by size exclusion chromatography
fragmentation method: fragmented using several acceleration voltages (80, 100, 150, and/or 180 V) of HCD
ionization type: During electrospray ionization the N-terminal glutamine can also readily cyclize
